name: G-12 validate-all: walk skips _meta/ folder (substrate, not source files)
command:
mkdir -p tree/_meta tree/google && printf 'not yaml at all
' > tree/_meta/INDEX.md && printf 'source:
  id: x
rules: []
' > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>err.txt; grep -q '"files_total":1' err.txt && echo meta_skipped 1>&2
